name: live-streaming-server
description: Self-hosted live streaming server with RTMP ingest, HLS delivery, management API, and real-time dashboard

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,dash,player -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:dash" "npm run dev:player"
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:dash
scripts.install:all: cd api && npm install && cd ../dash && npm install && cd ../player && npm install
scripts.lint: cd api && npm run lint && cd ../dash && npm run lint

author: Saken Tukenov
